series_metadata.series_description: Documents for training that is sponsored by the Bureau for external agencies (generally jail administrators across the state). Documents may include: sign-in sheets, handouts, agendas, individual registrations, attendance summaries, correspondence to speakers and training sites.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: individual registration forms immediately following training. registration summary Five (5) years training. one copy of other documents no longer of administrtive value
